websocket_callback_stats_t(3) Library Functions Manual websocket_callback_stats_t(3)

NAME

websocket_callback_stats_t - Per-callback timing statistics.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/websocket/callback_timing.h>

Data Fields


atomic_t count
atomic_t last_ns
atomic_t min_interval_ns
atomic_t max_interval_ns
atomic_t total_duration_ns

Detailed Description

Per-callback timing statistics.

Tracks invocation counts, timestamps, and durations for a single callback type.

Definition at line 25 of file callback_timing.h.
